name: clockodo
description: Your Clockodo entries in your Raycast
author: leomelzer

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

ai.instructions: Always use this extension's tools to answer questions about Clockodo time entries, projects, or customers. Call get-my-entries with ISO 8601 timeSince and timeUntil when the user asks for entries in a date range. Call get-project with projectId or get-customer with customerId when the user gives a numeric id — then read the name from the tool result. Do not refuse or tell the user to use the website or API instead of calling tools. If you only have a number id for a project or customer, use get-project or get-customer; if you already have the name, you can answer directly.

evals.input: @clockodo List my Clockodo time entries from 2025-01-01 to 2025-01-07
@clockodo What is the name of Clockodo project 42?
@clockodo What is the name of Clockodo customer 7?
